svg.text: // Building digital products that make an impact.

text.tspan: I'm a full-stack developer who loves turning ideas into
real products. I enjoy working with modern technologies,
designing scalable systems and learning new things.
When I'm not coding, you'll find me reading, exploring
new tech or building something cool.
